diagrams.title: DFA for strings ending with 'ab'
diagrams.description: Three-state DFA that accepts all strings over {a,b} ending with substring 'ab'
elements: q0: Initial state, not final - 'haven't seen a'
q1: State after seeing 'a', not final
Arrows showing transitions on a and b
diagrams.purpose: Understanding state design and transitions for pattern matching

diagrams.title: DFA for even number of 1s
diagrams.description: Two-state DFA accepting binary strings with even number of 1s including empty string
elements: q0: Initial and final - even count of 1s
Self-loop on b in both states
diagrams.purpose: Understanding parity counting with minimal states

diagrams.title: DFA 5-tuple representation
diagrams.description: General structure showing relationship between all five components of a DFA
elements: δ as directed edges with labels
q0 marked with incoming arrow from 'start'

diagrams.title: Transition table for 3-state DFA
diagrams.description: Tabular representation showing all transitions for each state-input combination
elements: Highlight: final state row (q0 or whichever)
diagrams.purpose: Understanding transition function as a complete mapping

visuals.title: Deterministic Finite Automata
visuals.description: Visual diagram for deterministic finite automata
